weekly.title: KITCHEN EQUIPMENT
items: Check fryers for leaks, damaged cords, loose fittings, or unusual noise.
Check fryer filter pan and drain valves.
Check grill/flat-top controls, surface, grease trough, and guards.
Check hood filters and confirm exhaust fan is working.
Check toaster and hot-holding equipment.
Check walk-in cooler and freezer doors, seals, ice buildup, and drains.
Check line coolers, prep rails, and reach-ins.
Check ice machine and dish machine for leaks or visible buildup.

weekly.title: SAFETY & BUILDING
items: Check fire extinguishers, exits, exit signs, and emergency lights.
Check cords, plugs, outlets, and electrical panels for damage or heat.
Check hand sinks, toilets, faucets, floor drains, and mop sink for leaks or clogs.
Check floors, mats, ladders, shelving, and chemical storage.
Check for pest activity and gaps around doors or wall openings.
Check HVAC airflow, unusual noise, odors, or water leaks.

weekly.title: GUEST & EXTERIOR AREAS
items: Check dining room tables, chairs, booths, doors, and floor transitions.
Check restroom fixtures, grab bars, dispensers, fans, and hardware.
Check parking lot, sidewalks, exterior lights, signs, and drive-thru lane.
Check dumpster pad and used-oil area for spills, overflow, or pests.

weekly.title: WEEKLY CLOSEOUT
items: Remove damaged smallwares, cutting boards, baskets, utensils, or containers.
Check POS, kitchen screens, printers, headsets, and visible cables.
Follow up on every open repair before signing off the week.
Manager reviewed all unchecked items and arranged follow-up.

period.title: COOKING & REFRIGERATION
items: Inspect fryer and grill bodies, casters, connections, and leveling.
Check cooking-equipment temperature accuracy.
Clean accessible refrigerator and freezer air-intake areas.
Inspect walk-in fans, drains, door hardware, and seals.
Confirm ice-machine cleaning and filter service are current.
Delime and clean the dish machine as required.

period.title: HOOD, GREASE & BUILDING SYSTEMS
items: Deep-clean removable hood filters.
Confirm hood-cleaning and fire-suppression inspections are current.
Review grease-interceptor and used-oil service.
Inspect or replace accessible HVAC filters.
Inspect water-heater area, shutoffs, exposed piping, and drains.
Check walls, ceilings, floors, grout, sealant, and wall openings.

period.title: SAFETY & EXTERIOR
items: Check emergency lights, exit signs, first-aid supplies, PPE, and spill kit.
Review the pest-control report and complete needed repairs.
Inspect exterior drainage, signs, awnings, and drive-thru equipment.
Tighten or repair dining room and restroom hardware.

period.title: PERIOD CLOSEOUT
items: Review repeat equipment failures and repair-versus-replace needs.
Review vendor service records and upcoming inspection dates.
Check maintenance supplies and reorder needed items.
Review unusual water, gas, or electric usage.
Carry all unfinished repairs into the next period.
Manager reviewed all unchecked items and arranged follow-up.
